Program Overview: Stress is a now a common place occurrence in everyday busy life owing to deadlines and the multi-tasking. Stress suggests a negative connotation. Program Overview: Time Management is the need of the hour, be it a student, a sportsperson, a housewife or a manager. It is not about doing more tasks in specified time, but it is about achieving the desired result by right efforts and being effective. Our Time management training enables you to be proactive , so that you act on a situation rather than react. Time management is taught with various approaches like important matrix, innovative techniques and other models.
Program Purpose: Help you get organized , schedule the tasks Helps you to select the high payoff tasks that generate better results Formulating result oriented goals Manage stress by managing time
Time Management Training Outline: Our Time Management Training lays emphasis on the following areas
Identifying the loopholes in the schedule and finding out the problem areas, SWOT analysis
Helps in scheduling the day, making a list of to-do tasks , giving a deadline to each of the tasks at monthly, weekly and daily period
Leaving the control of less important tasks- knowing what to delegate. Identifying the team Specific tasks allotted with timeframe targets Monitoring and Feedback
Helping people without them eating into your time
Find out the results expected and make SMART goals. We go by the 80-20 rule where 80 % results are achieved with 20% efforts. Monitor the goals vs efforts continuously with various tools.
Different tools right from the reminders to planning sheets to MIS helps in managing the time effectively
Using the tools daily and making it a part of your worklife helps in managing your time and stress levels
